name: Montego Classic Adult Cat Dry Food - Chicken 3kg
description: Product Overview Montego Classic Cat Chicken is a premium, nutritionally balanced dry food formulated for adult cats. Made with high quality chicken protein, essential vitamins, minerals, and fatty acids, it supports overall feline health, strong muscles, a shiny coat, and sustained energy levels. Nutritional Content & Benefits Protein & Fat (30% Protein, 12% Fat): Helps maintain healthy muscle mass and provides energy for daily activity. Essential Fatty Acids: Omega-3 and Omega-6 fatty acids promote healthy skin and a soft, glossy coat. Amino Acids & Taurine: Support heart function, vision, and the nervous system. Fibre & Digestive Support: Fructo-oligosaccharides and dietary fibre aid digestion and help control hairballs. Antioxidants & Vitamins: Vitamin A, C, D₃, and E plus minerals such as zinc, copper, and selenium boost immune health and overall vitality. Urinary Tract Support: Controlled sodium levels encourage water intake, helping maintain urinary health and reduce the risk of crystal formation. Ingredients Chicken meal, rice, corn*, corn gluten, chicken fat, powdered cellulose, tuna meal, beet pulp, brewer’s yeast, salmon meal, inulin, fish oil, tuna, salmon oil powder, acidifiers, encapsulated fatty acids, and amino acids. Additives (/kg): Vitamins: A (24,500 IU), D₃ (980 IU), E (70 IU), C (250 mg) Minerals: Potassium chloride (5.5 g), zinc hydroxychloride (75 mg), copper chloride (2 mg), potassium iodide (1 mg), sodium selenite (0.1 mg) Preservatives: Approved antioxidants Sensory: Natural meat-based flavour enhancers May contain GMOs. Typical Analysis Nutrient Value Crude Protein 30% Moisture 10% Total Fat 12% Crude Fibre 6.5% Crude Ash 7.5% Calcium 1.2% Phosphorus 0.7% Magnesium 0.11% Potassium 0.6% Sodium 0.35% Omega-6 Fatty Acids 1.5% Omega-3 Fatty Acids 0.3% Glycaemic Carbohydrates 30% Taurine 0.15% Metabolisable Energy 370 kcal / 100 g Feeding Guide Weight of Cat Moderate Activity High Activity 2–3 kg 35–45 g 43–57 g 3–5 kg 45–63 g 57–82 g 5–8 kg 63–87 g 82–112 g Always provide fresh, clean water to encourage hydration and support urinary health. Key Benefits Supports strong muscles and sustained energy Promotes a healthy, shiny coat and supple skin Aids in urinary tract and hairball management Boosts immune system and overall well-being
